name: Autologous Mitochondrial Transplant for Cerebral Ischemia
short_name: Autologous mitochondrial transplant cerebral ischemia registry
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov registry record for a recruiting University of Washington study of endovascular autologous mitochondrial transplantation during standard-of-care reperfusion therapy for cerebral ischemia; status and dates are recorded as of June 3, 2026, with last update posted May 21, 2025 and no registry-posted results.
